title: 3D hero loads and shows interactive motion on pointer movement
description: Verifies the landing page hero renders a 3D sculpture and responds to pointer movement with a camera/perspective shift.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero 3D content to finish loading
Move the pointer across the hero area
Verify the hero 3D sculpture is displayed
Verify the hero camera perspective shifts in response to pointer movement

title: 3D hero parallax responds to scrolling
description: Verifies scrolling on the landing page triggers parallax/cinematic movement affecting the hero section presentation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page using the mouse wheel
Scroll up the page using the mouse wheel
Verify parallax movement is visible while scrolling in the hero area

title: 3D hero shows visible rotation/animation over time
description: Verifies the hero sculpture exhibits continuous rotation or subtle floating motion without user interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero 3D content to finish loading
Wait for a short period to observe motion
Verify the hero 3D sculpture shows continuous motion (rotation or floating)

title: Hero displays a fallback state when the 3D model does not load in time
description: Verifies the hero presents a visible fallback visual and guidance when assets remain loading beyond an expected threshold.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for an extended period for hero assets to load
Verify a fallback visual for the hero 3D content is displayed
Verify contextual guidance is displayed indicating the model could not load

title: Sculpture gallery loads and displays sculpture cards
description: Verifies the gallery section on the landing page renders a browsable grid/list of sculpture entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down to the sculpture gallery section
Verify sculpture cards are displayed in the gallery

title: Gallery cards show a hover interaction effect
description: Verifies hovering over a sculpture card triggers a visual hover effect to indicate interactivity.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down to the sculpture gallery section
Move the pointer over a sculpture card
Verify the hovered sculpture card shows a hover interaction effect

title: Open a sculpture into full-screen viewer and see 3D model plus details
description: Verifies a user can open a sculpture entry into a full-screen viewer with a rotating 3D sculpture and details panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down to the sculpture gallery section
Click a sculpture card to open its full-screen viewer
Wait for the 3D viewer content to finish loading
Verify a full-screen sculpture viewer is displayed
Verify sculpture details (title, location, and year) are displayed

title: Rotate the sculpture in the full-screen viewer with pointer control
description: Verifies the 3D viewer responds to pointer movement by rotating the sculpture for inspection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down to the sculpture gallery section
Click a sculpture card to open its full-screen viewer
Wait for the 3D viewer content to finish loading
Move the pointer across the 3D viewer to rotate the sculpture
Verify the sculpture orientation changes in response to pointer movement

title: Viewer shows fallback when 3D viewer fails to initialize or model fails to load
description: Verifies the full-screen viewer presents a fallback image and guidance to retry or return when 3D content is unavailable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down to the sculpture gallery section
Click a sculpture card to open its full-screen viewer
Wait for an extended period for the 3D viewer to initialize
Verify a fallback image is displayed in place of the 3D viewer
Verify contextual guidance is displayed to retry or return to the gallery

title: Smooth scrolling provides inertia-based cinematic movement between sections
description: Verifies Lenis-powered scrolling feels continuous and inertial while traversing sections on the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Use the mouse wheel to scroll down through multiple sections
Stop scrolling and wait briefly
Verify scrolling continues briefly with preserved inertia after input stops
Verify the page lands on a later section of the layout

title: Parallax effects remain in sync with smooth scrolling
description: Verifies parallax and cinematic transitions remain consistent while scrolling smoothly across sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Use the mouse wheel to scroll down slowly
Use the mouse wheel to scroll down quickly
Verify parallax effects are visible and remain synchronized with scroll movement

title: Fallback guidance appears if smooth scrolling engine fails and scrolling is janky
description: Verifies that when smooth scrolling fails, the UI presents a visible suggestion to reload or disable smooth scrolling for stability.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Use the mouse wheel to scroll repeatedly up and down
Verify a suggestion is displayed to reload or disable smooth scrolling for improved stability
